nasb.text: And immediately He entered the boat with His disciples and came to the district of Dalmanutha.

esv.text: And immediately he got into the boat with his disciples and went to the district of Dalmanutha.

cnv.text: 就立刻和門徒上了船，來到大瑪努他地區。

ccb.text: 随即和门徒上船，来到大玛努他地区。

csbs.text: 随即与他的门徒们一起上船，来到达玛努达地区。
